title: orchis × wulffiana
intro: Orchis × wulffiana, also known as Wulff's orchid or Wulff's hybrid orchid, is a hybrid orchid species created by crossing the European orchid (Orchis mascula) with the lady's orchid (Orchis purpurea). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis × wulffiana include its ability to support respiratory health, improve immune function, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Orchis × wulffiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
